creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Thanks for the hint.

The problem was triggered by two remnant .la files, dated to January, 2015. Since portmaster does sometimes not a proper job, I guess those files have accidentally left over. I checked for for other files with the find command given as you referred to and I found that only port graphics/graphviz:

 /usr/local/lib/graphviz/libgvplugin_xlib.la was installed by package graphviz-2.38.0_10

installs such a libtool archive.

Kind regards, thanks and please close the PR,

oh
